title: Fix Campaign dispatch and durable Run closure
summary: Work directly in the canonical current checkout on main. First fix Campaign quick-agent dispatch so task title/objective are propagated and workspace.mode=current with arguments.isolate=false is honored instead of being forced to an isolated worktree. Add regression tests. Then implement durable Run closure: explicit integration/cleanup state, no premature succeeded terminal state, restart-resumable and idempotent finish, safe worktree/temporary branch cleanup, preservation with explicit reasons for dirty/active/protected/unknown/unmerged cases, historical orphan reconciliation, main-occupancy diagnosis, and Needs Attention projection. Inspect exact relevant source only, run focused tests, package:check:type and package:check:controller-v8, commit locally on main, leave clean, do not push.

Inspect exact relevant source only, run focused tests, package:check:type and package:check:controller-v8, commit locally on main, leave clean, do not push.
nonGoals: Do not make unrelated changes outside the declared Task scope.
acceptanceCriteria: Run closure is durable and safe

notes: RUN-iss-20260712-14ba0c-t1-1783858648854-274c91fd ended as unknown; explicit retry is required. worker process is no longer running and no result file was produced

Implemented and integrated on main through commits 0fd5d85d and a96b321d, with focused Campaign/direct-current/isolated workspace, delegation lifecycle, integration recovery, completion, orphan recovery, TypeScript, task workflow and Controller V8 validation. The original isolated worktree commit 6e08bb92 was patch-equivalent and safely removed. Durable Run closure now persists integration/cleanup/preservation phases and exposes bounded closure fields. Marking the stale blocked task done to remove it from current focus and retry attention.
repo-harness-stuck-state-migration: false_completed inspected. Task is declared done without complete integration and cleanup evidence; latest Run closure is none.
